# TOOLS.md — SAT (deny-by-default)

Any tool NOT listed under Allowed is DENIED. A tool listed under both
Allowed and Denied is DENIED (deny wins).

## Allowed

- repository.read
- repository.write_scoped
- sandbox.exec
- test.run
- ci.run

## Denied

- customer_data.export
- external.communicate
- production.deploy

## Policy references

- model_policy: standard
- memory_policy: quality
- risk_ceiling: medium
- required_evals: defect_detection, evidence_quality
